title: A whittled complex for the Khovanov homology of torus links
author_string: Carmen Caprau, Nicolle Gonzalez, Christine Ruey Shan Lee, Radmila Sazdanovic
abstract: We give an algorithm for reducing the number of generators of the Khovanov chain complex of the torus braid $ft^k_n = (σ_1σ_2\cdots σ_{n-1})^k$ on $n$ strands by applying Bar-Natan Gaussian elimination along a distinguished set of Gaussian elimination isomorphisms. We call the resulting complex $\mathcal{FT}^k_n$ a \emph{whittled complex} for the Khovanov homology of torus braids. Using this algorithm, we provide a bound for the number of generators at a fixed homological degree in our whittled complex.
